title: Everbuild Patio Wizard Moss, Mould and Algea Remover 5ltr & Patio Seal Paving | Water Base Sealer and Appearance Enhancer for New and Recently Cleaned Paving - Clear - 5 Litre
features: Product 1: No need for scrubbing or pressure washing just apply and leave to dry, ideal for use prior to painting or staining,
Product 1: Made from biodegradable ingredients and does not include any bleach or acid, making this formulation non-hazardous to children or pets once dry
Product 1: approximately 60 sq. m depending on the level of growth and dilution required
Product 1: Ensure debris such as leaves, twigs, soil and weeds remover prior to application and expect to see green growth die over a period of days depending on conditions

Product 2: Specifically designed for exterior use only. Protects and seals both new and old concrete stone, brick and paving surfaces. Ideal for use outdoors on areas such as; block paved drives, pathways, natural stones, patios, flagstones and more.

Product 2: Acrylic based solution that provides a tough, long-lasting polymeric seal on concrete stone and brick surfaces. Clear liquid that doesn’t over-alter the surface look of concrete stone. Provides a smooth satin mid sheen finish to driveways, paving stones, patios or flagstone areas.
Product 2: Improves appearance of paths/stone and also acts as a dustproofer and facilitates easier cleaning.
Product 2: Dramatically improves water and mark resistance, High degree of water repellency in dried film.
description: From the manufacturer Ensure any debris such as leaves, twigs, loose soil or weeds are removed from surfaces to be treated prior to application. Dilute with water at a maximum rate of 1 part liquid to 9 parts water. Test a small inconspicuous area prior to use. After applying simply leave for 1 to 3 days and the green growth will slowly disappear. On heavily soiled surfaces a second application may be required. Sika Patio Seal Protection sealer and appearance enhancer for paving.
